ere it is the Sun.
In those three yogas you were asked to ignore the Sun. Here
you are asked to ignore the Moon. If benefic planets (except
the Moon) occupy the 2nd, 12th and both the houses with re-
spect to the Sun, the resulting three yogas are respectively called
Subhavesi, Subhavasi and Subha-Ubhayacar!. But if these planets
are malefic, the three Yogas will be called Pdpavesi, Papavasi
and Papa-Ubhayacarl respectively. When there are benefics
on either side of the Lagna i.e. in the 12th and the 2nd houses,
the resulting yoga is termed fubhakartarl. If malefics
occupy these houses, the yoga is called Papakartarl. If there
are benefics in the 2nd house from the Lagna unaspected by
malefics, the Yoga is called Susubha. Now I shall give the effects
of these yogas in order. Effects of ubhavesi : The person will
be very handsome, happy, a paragon of virtues, brave and a king.
Subhavdsi : He will be famous, liked by all, very attractive,
munificent and king's favourite, f.
